channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Automated 90% of The Ethers.js v5 v6 Migration using Codemods and AI
item.description: Ethers v6 dropped a breaking change on every project that touched BigNumber, utils, or providers — which is basically every DeFi frontend ever written. The migration guide listed over 40 breaking...

item.title: Quantum Computers Are Coming for Web3 Identity
item.description: By Malak Gandhi | BTech CS (AI & ML), ATLAS SkillTech University If you’ve spent any time in the tech world lately, you’ve probably heard two major buzzwords: Decentralized Identity (DID) and...

item.title: Should Hand-Written Code Be Considered Art Now?
item.description: A few years ago, "writing code" meant sitting down and writing code with your own hands, kicking in a concentrated thinking process, being in a "flow". Today, more and more of it is generated,...

item.title: 深度解构纽约时报视频流架构：如何构建基于 HLS 与 FFmpeg 的高性能提取引擎
item.description: 引言 作为开发者，我们对大型平台如何在全球范围内管理和分发多媒体数据总是充满好奇。《纽约时报》（The New York Times）作为全球顶尖的新闻机构，其视频分发架构并非简单的文件托管，而是一套复杂的、基于 HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) 的动态自适应流媒体系统。 对于许多研究人员和开发者来说，存档 NYTimes...

item.title: เจาะลึกสถาปัตยกรรม Media Streaming ของ LinkedIn: การสร้าง Engine สกัดวิดีโอประสิทธิภาพสูงด้วย HLS และ FFmpeg
item.description: บทนำ ในฐานะนักพัฒนา เรามักจะหลงใหลในวิธีที่แพลตฟอร์มระดับโลกจัดการกับการส่งข้อมูลสื่อในวงกว้าง LinkedIn ซึ่งเป็นเครือข่ายโซเชียลระดับมืออาชีพที่ใหญ่ที่สุดในโลก มีการวิวัฒนาการการส่งเนื้อหาจากลิงก์...

item.title: Giải mã kiến trúc Media Streaming của LinkedIn: Xây dựng Engine trích xuất video hiệu suất cao với HLS và FFmpeg
item.description: Giới thiệu Là các nhà phát triển, chúng ta thường bị mê hoặc bởi cách các nền tảng quy mô lớn quản lý việc phân phối dữ liệu truyền thông toàn cầu. LinkedIn, mạng xã hội nghề nghiệp lớn nhất thế...

item.title: تفكيك بنية بث الفيديو في LinkedIn: بناء محرك استخراج عالي الأداء باستخدام HLS و FFmpeg
item.description: مقدمة كمطورين، غالباً ما ننبهر بكيفية إدارة المنصات الضخمة لتوصيل الوسائط المتعددة على نطاق عالمي. تعد LinkedIn، أكبر شبكة مهنية في العالم، نموذجاً مثالياً للدراسة؛ حيث تطورت طريقة توزيع المحتوى...

item.title: Crossposting without the copy-paste: a GitHub Action from Hugo to dev.to
item.description: My blog runs on Hugo. I also recently discovered I can cross-post to dev.to, because that's where a lot of the conversation actually happens. For a while, my workflow was the obvious one: write...

item.title: Retrofitting Privacy: Adding Midnight to an Existing dApp Step by Step
item.description: Retrofitting Privacy: Adding Midnight to an Existing dApp Step by Step Last year I inherited a voting dApp that had been running in production for eight months. It worked fine — users could submit...

item.title: Hack the Learning Curve - Part 1: What Even Is Cybersecurity? (And Why You Should Care)
item.description: Author: Trix Cyrus 🔹 Try My Waymap Pentesting Tool 🔹 Follow TrixSec GitHub 🔹 Join TrixSec Telegram So... What Even Is Cybersecurity? Let me guess. You have heard the word "cybersecurity" thrown...

item.title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why
item.description: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.

item.title: Dyson’s handheld fan is more powerful and louder than I expected
item.description: Two years ago I attended a picturesque outdoor wedding in August where the hot and humid weather had guests occasionally ducking into their cars to enjoy a blast of AC. Dyson’s new $99.99 handheld...

item.title: There’s nothing like an RPG over vacation
item.description: With a vacation comes a big choice: What game should I focus on during the trip? I thought about grinding out the harder levels of Super Meat Boy 3D, but I was looking for something more chill. I...

item.title: The AI apps are coming for your PC
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 124, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, send me your Coachella fits, and also you can read all the old...

item.title: Schematik Is ‘Cursor for Hardware.’ Anthropic Wants In
item.description: Schematik is a program that aims to help people vibe code for physical devices. Hopefully, it won’t blow anything up.

item.title: It Takes 2 Minutes to Hack the EU’s New Age-Verification App
item.description: Plus: Major data breaches at a gym chain and hotel giant, a disruptive DDoS attack against Bluesky, dubious ICE hires, and more.

item.title: [Webinar] Eliminate Ghost Identities Before They Expose Your Enterprise Data
item.description: In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Not phishing. Not weak passwords. Unmanaged non-human identities that nobody was watching. For every...

item.title: $13.74M Hack Shuts Down Sanctioned Grinex Exchange After Intelligence Claims
item.description: Grinex, a Kyrgyzstan-incorporated cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.K. and the U.S. last year, said it's suspending operations after it blamed Western intelligence agencies for a $13.74...

item.title: Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE-2024-3721 to Hijack TBK DVRs for DDoS Botnet
item.description: Threat actors are exploiting security flaws in TBK DVR and end‑of‑life (EoL) TP-Link Wi-Fi routers to deploy Mirai-botnet variants on compromised devices, according to findings from Fortinet...

item.title: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.
item.description: World, which has raised eyebrows (but also a lot of interest) with its Orb-centered anonymous verification project, is looking to expand its influence via a bevy of new partnerships.

item.title: US-sanctioned currency exchange says $15 million heist done by "unfriendly states"
item.description: Grinex says needed hacking resources "available exclusively to ... unfriendly states."

item.title: OpenAI’s former Sora boss is leaving
item.description: Last month, OpenAI gave up on its Sora video generation tool, and on Friday, the Sora team's leader, Bill Peebles, announced that he is leaving the company. OpenAI has been shifting its priorities...

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: New Giant Squid Video
item.description: Pretty fantastic video from Japan of a giant squid eating another squid. As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security stories in the news that I haven’t covered. Blog...

item.title: Should you stare into Sam Altman’s orb before your next date?
item.description: Tinder users who prove they're a real person by visiting an identity-verifying orb will soon be able to get five free boosts in the app - and it's just the latest service to embrace the orb....

item.title: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles exit OpenAI as company continues to shed ‘side quests’
item.description: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.

item.title: Anthropic’s new cybersecurity model could get it back in the government’s good graces
item.description: The Trump administration has spent nearly two months fighting with AI company Anthropic. It's dubbed the company a "RADICAL LEFT, WOKE COMPANY" full of "Leftwing nut jobs" and a menace to national...

item.title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
item.description: The former Instagram VP is departing the ChatGPT-maker, which is folding the AI science application he led into Codex.

item.title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
item.description: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

item.title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
item.description: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.

item.title: Betting on the news raises ethical questions for journalists
item.description: Prediction market exchanges have created an environment where just about any piece of information is potentially monetizable: How well will BTS's new song perform this week? How hot will Los...
